proof.title: Three sentence explanation
proof.body: I explained the idea in point, example, next step.

ideal_output.whatWorked: Your structure made the idea easy to follow.
ideal_output.suggestion: Name the main point a little earlier next time.
ideal_output.encouragement: This gives you a clear next version to try.

ideal_output.whatWorked: The main idea came through clearly.
ideal_output.suggestion: Try trimming one extra setup sentence before the example.
ideal_output.encouragement: The next version only needs one small edit.

proof.title: Boundary sentence
proof.body: I said I can help Friday, not today.

ideal_output.whatWorked: The boundary was easy to understand.
ideal_output.suggestion: Add one calm reason if the context needs it.

ideal_output.whatWorked: Starting with the heading made the task visible.
ideal_output.suggestion: Add one bullet under it for the next practice.
ideal_output.encouragement: A small repeatable step is enough to build from.

proof.title: Better question
proof.body: I asked what would unblock the next step.

ideal_output.whatWorked: The new question points toward action.
ideal_output.suggestion: Include who can answer it or what context they need.
ideal_output.encouragement: That keeps the request useful and focused.

proof.title: Preference practice
proof.body: I said I prefer the morning slot.

ideal_output.suggestion: Add the reason in one short phrase if it helps the listener decide.
ideal_output.encouragement: The core sentence is already clear.

ideal_output.whatWorked: The tradeoffs make the decision easier to compare.
ideal_output.suggestion: Circle the tradeoff you are willing to accept for now.
ideal_output.encouragement: That turns the map into a next step.

proof.title: Feedback rewrite
proof.body: One observation and one next step.

input.draftFeedback: This is much better than before.

ideal_output.whatWorked: The feedback now gives the person something specific to use.
ideal_output.suggestion: Add one example from their proof when you have it.
ideal_output.encouragement: That keeps the note grounded in the practice.

proof.title: Restart note
proof.body: Smallest version after two missed days.

ideal_output.whatWorked: You restarted without making the gap the whole story.
ideal_output.suggestion: Pick the same small version for tomorrow.

proof.title: Main point first
proof.body: I moved the main point to sentence one.

ideal_output.whatWorked: The first sentence tells me what to listen for.
ideal_output.suggestion: Keep the example short so it supports that point.
ideal_output.encouragement: That makes the message easier to follow.
